fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY is a leveraged ETF designed to track volatility, often used as a hedging tool or for speculation on market downturns. Recent articles highlight its role as a put option surrogate for S&P 500 bears and a unique hedging instrument for uncertain times. However, the leveraged nature and short-term focus of the VIX futures it tracks mean that "good things do not last," suggesting its effectiveness is time-limited and potentially subject to significant decay.
